more.title: GOODBYE US$ DOLLAR: Finance Minister Mthuli Ncube instructs government to pay everyone in ZiG currency
more.description: HARARE – A significant shift in Zimbabwe’s economic landscape is underway, as Finance Minister Mthuli Ncube has issued a directive mandating the exclusive use of the Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) currency for all local government procurement.
